problem id: e5b3f73b
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) XOR NOT SHL(5)) OR SHR(2)

examples:
  11110100 -> 11111101
  10000101 -> 01110011
  01010010 -> 00111101
  01000011 -> 10010101
  00001011 -> 11000111
  00000111 -> 00100111
  00111000 -> 00111110
  00111110 -> 11001111

query: 11001000
predicted answer: 10111011
